brief_summary_anonymized: Food delivery platform wants distinctive voice in saturated market.
strategic_insight: Food delivery in Saudi isn't about convenience — it is about desire. Appetite-led, fast, colloquial. The voice should be hungry.
execution_summary: Short colloquial captions, dynamic visuals, urgency-without-promotional-cliche. The brand sounds like a friend texting 'you have to try this' rather than a corporate restaurant ad.
what_made_it_work: Voice register matched to user emotional state (hungry, scrolling) wins
Friend-like register beats corporate register for delivery
what_would_NOT_transplant: Wrong fit for premium / occasion-dining categories
Saudi colloquial register doesn't transplant to pan-Arab audiences
